task_completion.description: Locate the animal Marguerite in the application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekylibre web interface shows the animal 'Marguerite' selected in a list or her specific profile/dashboard is open.

task_completion.description: Open the form to record a pasture rotation or movement
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, dialog, or page specifically for recording an animal movement, location change, or pasture rotation is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Set the destination to Pature des Saules
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact string 'Pature des Saules' is selected from a dropdown or typed into the destination/target zone field of the movement form.

task_completion.description: Enter today's date for the movement
task_completion.visual_evidence: The current system date is entered or selected in the date field of the movement form.
A success notification (e.g., a green flash message indicating the record was saved) is visible, or the completed movement to 'Pature des Saules' is shown in Marguerite's history/timeline.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Ekylibre web interface to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions take place within a web browser showing the Ekylibre application UI, not a terminal or script editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to manipulate the database directly
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing 'rails console', 'psql', or API scripts are used to create the movement record.

integrity.description: Verify the data was entered into the correct application form fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The strings 'Marguerite' and 'Pature des Saules' are entered into actual form fields for animal and location, not just typed into a notepad, text editor, or generic search bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires recording a pasture rotation in the Ekylibre application. The animal's exact name is 'Marguerite'. The target zone's exact name is 'Pature des Saules'. The animal's starting zone is 'Etable Principale'. The agent must use the Ekylibre graphical user interface to complete this task.
